pattern: The Dutch-national-flag partition sweeps once with three pointers, swapping values to the correct end so the three categories sort in place without counting.
hints: There are only three possible values, so the sorted result is just all of the lowest, then the middles, then the highest.
Keep a boundary for the placed lows on the left and the placed highs on the right while a scanner moves through the middle.
When the scanner sees a low, swap it to the low boundary and advance both; on a high, swap it to the high boundary and shrink that boundary without advancing; on a middle, just advance the scanner.

edge_inputs.description: only two of the three colors present

stress.description: random arrays of zeros, ones, and twos
stress.note: uniform distribution exercises all three partitions
